_comment: EXAMPLE ONLY. Copy to ops/secrets.json (gitignored) and fill real values. The automation reads these via env vars or this file. Never commit ops/secrets.json.

console._comment: Optional. Set CONSOLE_PASSWORD env on Coolify to gate the internal console API (header x-console-key). Leave unset to disable the gate.

sessions._comment: Browser session for the post-login wizard. NEVER put passwords here. Set ONE of: a saved profile dir (a Firefox profile dir if --browser firefox, or a Chrome user-data-dir if --browser chromium -- that YOU logged into by hand), or a cookies JSON export (BROWSER_COOKIES_MS).
